project.name: ROLI Country Profiles
project.description: Static country-profile dashboard and data parser for the World Justice Project Rule of Law Index

conventions.styling: Inline styles with shared constants in config/
conventions.exports: Named exports for utilities, default exports for components
conventions.fileNaming: camelCase for utilities, PascalCase for components

dataContract.countryMetrics: overall, f1..f8, sf11..sf87, ranking and change fields

security.deploymentHeaders: vercel.json is the source of truth for CSP and HTTP security headers
security.runtimePolicy: No third-party runtime APIs without CSP review
